items.title: Bowlers, Bryce star in Scotland's comfortable win over Bangladesh
items.summary: Captain Kathryn Bryce picked a wicket and scored a swift fifty in chase

items.title: Marsh out of Pakistan series with ankle injury, Inglis to captain
items.summary: Stand-in skipper Marsh has been withdrawn due to an ankle injury with his availability for the Bangladesh tour to be determined

items.title: 'Options' for Green's 2027 ODI World Cup role, David unavailable but selectors hopeful
items.summary: Australia coach Andrew McDonald keen to trial Green in some different roles in Pakistan and Bangladesh in a bid to find finishing power after Maxwell's ODI retirement
